title: phyllanthus pileostigma
intro: Phyllanthus pileostigma, also known as the Pileostigma tree or Pileostigma plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various parts of the world, particularly in India and Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus pileostigma include its potential to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus pileostigma typically involve the plant's leaves, fruits, or roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
